text.title: Ad Account Hygiene Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 500 AND active_campaigns >= 2 AND owner_named == false

conclusion.verdict: name owners per item before cycle starts

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 500 AND active_campaigns >= 2 AND owner_named == true

conclusion.verdict: run weekly (14) + monthly (8); log evidence + reasons

example.trace: spend_monthly >= 500 AND active_campaigns >= 2 AND owner_named == true → conclusion ref="weekly-monthly-split" verdict="run weekly (14) + monthly (8); log evidence + reasons"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
